__fixture__.name: out_of_window
__fixture__.scenario: A managed-control-plane client attempts to call an API family outside both the current supported line and the declared previous-minor/LTS window. Cached read paths remain available, but a privileged write is refused. Outcome is 'refused_out_of_window', fail_closed_state.posture is 'read_only', and the repair hints include 'use_cached_read_only_mode' and 'upgrade_component'. Exercises the 'unsupported / out_of_window_read_only' lane of skew_window:managed_control_plane.current_plus_previous_minor_or_lts.

dropped_capabilities.reason_note: Client API family 2025.10 is two minors behind the declared previous-minor/LTS window; privileged writes are blocked.

negotiation.reason: Client falls outside the current supported line plus declared previous-minor/LTS window; cached safe operations remain, privileged writes are refused with a visible incompatibility reason.

skew_window.window_summary: Current published service family plus the declared previous minor or LTS window.

downgrade_behavior.state_preservation_note: Cached read-only state remains usable; privileged write paths are refused rather than partially executed.
downgrade_behavior.note: Downgrade to the prior minor or LTS is a best-effort lane.

fail_closed_state.visible_reason: Your client is outside the declared managed-control-plane support window. You can continue to view cached metadata and safe read paths; privileged writes are blocked until the client is upgraded or a staged rollout reaches this region.

unsupported_state_behavior.contract_rule: Cached read-only safe operations only; privileged writes are blocked with an explicit incompatibility reason.

repair_hints.instruction: Continue working against cached metadata and read-only paths until the client upgrade reaches a supported API family.
Upgrade the desktop, CLI, or browser companion client to a version inside the declared previous-minor/LTS window.
Wait for the staged rollout to reach your region if a coordinated service-family rollback is in flight.

notes: Illustrative seed envelope only; this is not a live release packet.
